texto: Nostalgia was diagnosed [as a medical illness] at a time when art and science had not yet entirely severed their umbilical ties and when the mind and body internal and external well-being were treated together...Our progeny well might poeticize depression and see it as a global atmospheric condition, immune to treatment with Prozac.
explicacao: Citação de Svetlana Boym sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Nostalgia was diagnosed [as a medical illness] at a time when art and science had not yet entirel…” articula reflexao, depression, nostalgia em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como nostalgia e psychiatry.
